canonical_city_universe.top_1000_rule: Rank GHSL urban centres by latest available population, retain the largest 1000, and store crosswalks to country ISO3, admin1/admin2 codes, metropolitan/FUA identifiers, GeoNames/Wikidata IDs, and publisher-specific city IDs. Use UN WUP as a sanity check for large agglomerations whose statistical definition differs from GHSL built-up urban centres.

waves.objective: Build the immutable city identity spine for top-1000 joins.
Make St Paul, San Francisco, and NYC runnable beyond country-level proxies.
Build donor pools and direct local layers for Berlin, Stockholm, Spain, and UK housing cases.
Use high-coverage municipal outcome systems to scale LAC city coverage.
Build city/district rent and supply panels for high-payoff APAC systems.
Use direct Gulf rent datasets plus African municipal/census/building sources to widen non-OECD coverage.
Create an event-dated treatment registry for rent control and adjacent tenant/housing-supply policies.
